summary: Iteration 24 - Accent-insensitive search and Asaas sync import testing complete. All 10 backend tests passed. All frontend tests passed. The fixes for accent-insensitive client search and the new 'Importar do Asaas' button are working correctly.

tests: test_sincronizar_asaas_returns_expected_fields - PASS (success, imported, skipped, no_client, total_asaas, message)

frontend_tests.gestao_cobrancas_page: PASS - Page loads correctly with data-testid='gestao-cobrancas-page'
frontend_tests.import_asaas_button: PASS - Button found with data-testid='import-asaas-btn', visible, triggers confirm dialog
frontend_tests.sync_status_button: PASS - Button found with data-testid='sync-status-btn', visible, shows loading state when clicked
frontend_tests.accent_search_alvaro: PASS - Search 'alvaro' finds 'Álvaro Da Silva Junior'
frontend_tests.accent_search_silva_junior: PASS - Search 'silva junior' finds 'Álvaro Da Silva Junior'

Accent-insensitive client search.details: GET /api/clientes?search=alvaro correctly returns 'Álvaro Da Silva Junior'. Works with lowercase, uppercase, with/without accents.

POST /api/carteira/sincronizar-asaas.details: Returns {success, imported, skipped, no_client, total_asaas, message}. Requires admin auth. Handles already-imported charges correctly.

GET /api/clientes empty search.details: Returns all clients when no search parameter provided

Frontend 'Importar do Asaas' button.details: Button visible on /gestao-cobrancas page with data-testid='import-asaas-btn'. Triggers confirm dialog before calling sync endpoint.

Frontend 'Sincronizar Status' button.details: Button visible with data-testid='sync-status-btn'. Shows loading state when clicked.

critical_code_review_comments: Accent-insensitive search implementation uses regex character classes for Portuguese accents (á, é, í, ó, ú, ã, õ, ç, etc.)
Sync endpoint properly handles pagination (100 items per page) and maps Asaas customer_id to local clients
Frontend button correctly shows loading state during long-running sync operation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Accent-insensitive search and Asaas sync import fully tested and working. Client 'Álvaro Da Silva Junior' exists in the system and can be found by searching 'alvaro' (without accent). The system has 187 total charges (10 paid, 170 pending) and 117 clients. Asaas is connected in production mode.
